sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bit_rotate (num UInt8, shift UInt8);
UPDATE test_bit_rotate SET num = bitRotateLeft(num, shift);
SELECT num, shift, bitRotateLeft(num, shift) AS rotated FROM test_bit_rotate;
SELECT num, bitRotateLeft(num, 1) AS rotated_single, bitRotateLeft(num, 2) AS rotated_double FROM test_bit_rotate;
